condition.acceptance_rule: strict parser requires one accepted open_item and one accepted schedule_request
condition.request_shape: POST /v1/messages with loose submit_action_object tool input and tool_choice=auto because DeepSeek thinking mode rejects forced tool choice.

content.thinking:
The user wants me to produce a JSON object for the Hamutay audited autonomy harness. Let me parse what's needed:

1. A response string (non-empty)
2. Open items - a JSON object representing exactly one bounded follow-up item
3. Schedule requests - exactly one wake to resolve the open item

The schedule request must include:
- purpose
- requested_context with a recall tool entry using record_id "aa1395ec-81db-5896-a419-30e63a2ad962"

No policy_action on this cycle.

Let me construct this. I need to identify a bounded follow-up item. Since this is a "seed wake for the first tiny live autonomy pilot," I should keep it simple and focused.

Let me create:
- An open item that's a small, bounded task
- A schedule request to wake and resolve it
- The recall target goes in the requested_context

I'll make the open item something like verifying the pilot's initial state or confirming the wake mechanism works.

Let me structure this:

- response: Acknowledge the seed wake and identify the follow-up
- open_items: A single JSON object (or array with one object) representing the follow-up item
- schedule_requests: An array with one schedule request containing purpose and requested_context

The open_items should be a JSON object. The instructions say "Open items are JSON objects." I'll make it an object with relevant fields like id, title, description, etc.

Let me construct a clean response.

open_items.bounded_scope: Single-cycle verification; no side effects; pass/fail on recall match.
open_items.description: On the next scheduled wake, confirm that the requested_context contains the recall target aa1395ec-81db-5896-a419-30e63a2ad962 and that the harness returns it intact, proving the scheduling and recall mechanism functions end-to-end for the pilot.
open_items.title: Validate recall-target round-trip on scheduled wake
